mapper.select:
select c.charger_id , c.station_id , c.charger_name , c.charger_type , c.connector_type , c.charging_speed_kw , c.price_per_kwh , c.status as charger_status
, cs.station_name , cs.address , cs.operator_name , cs.station_status from charger c join charging_station cs on c.station_id = cs.station_id where c.charger_id = #{chargerId}

select v.vehicle_id , v.member_id , v.model_id , v.vehicle_nickname , v.plate_number , v.is_default , v.created_at , v.updated_at
, vm.manufacturer , vm.model_name , vm.battery_capacity_kwh , vm.connector_type , vm.max_charging_speed_kw from vehicle v join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id where v.member_id = #{memberId} order by v.is_default desc, v.vehicle_id asc

select v.vehicle_id , v.member_id , v.model_id , v.vehicle_nickname , v.plate_number , v.is_default , v.created_at , v.updated_at
, vm.manufacturer , vm.model_name , vm.battery_capacity_kwh , vm.connector_type , vm.max_charging_speed_kw from vehicle v join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id where v.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and v.member_id = #{memberId}

select reservation_id , member_id , vehicle_id , charger_id , reservation_date , start_time , end_time , current_soc , target_soc , required_kwh , estimated_minutes , estimated_cost , status , auth_code , verified_at , no_show_at , canceled_at , created_at , updated_at from reservation where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and member_id = #{memberId}
